calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: Phase 3 cutover end-to-end smoke
items.note: Trivial smoke -- drives the claim->result->writer->queue-writer Phase 3 cycle. Run once on 2026-05-28 cutover day; not a scientific test.
